narrative:
Hanover Twp 10 (precinct in Butler County) has 480 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.8 percentage points.
